results.title: Inception
results.overview: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered to be impossible.

results.title: Fight Club
results.overview: A ticking-time bomb insomniac and a slippery soap salesman channel primal male aggression into a shocking new form of therapy.

results.title: The Dark Knight
results.overview: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime. With the help of Lt. Jim Gordon and District Attorney Harvey Dent, Batman sets out to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations that plague the streets.

results.title: Unknown Indie Film
results.overview: A small independent film with no backdrop image available.

results.title: Pulp Fiction
results.overview: A burger-loving hit man, his philosophical partner, a drug-addled gangster's moll and a washed-up boxer converge in this sprawling, comedic crime caper.

results.title: The Matrix
results.overview: Set in the 22nd century, The Matrix tells the story of a computer hacker who joins a group of underground insurgents fighting the vast and powerful computers who now rule the earth.
